title: Gear Fifth Awakens
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Nami as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I refuse to believe that's chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sort of beast's power do you hold?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Chopper!! Chopper, that's you, isn't it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe 'cause of all this soap, he can't recognise me? But he's still chopper, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just so you know, the thought never crossed my mind, absolutely not! Not even for a minute!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, what's wrong!? Don't you recognise me!? It's Nami!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: At the bottom of the stairs is...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
